metadata.title: Duane Syndrome - Global Information & Community Portal
metadata.description: Comprehensive resource for Duane Syndrome patients, parents, and friends. Medical information, specialist directory, community support, and interactive tools.

hero.title: One Shared Vision
hero.subtitle: Your home for research, lived experiences, and meaningful connection in the Duane Syndrome community.
hero.description: Whether you’re a patient, a parent, or a medical professional, we provide a space to navigate the unique challenges of DS together. From the latest clinical breakthroughs to the stories that make us feel seen, we are here to bridge the gap between diagnosis and daily life.

persona.title: I am...
persona.patientDesc: Tips, community, and tools for living your best life
persona.parentDesc: Guidance, specialists, and support for your child
persona.friend: A friend, family member, or educator
persona.friendDesc: Understand Duane Syndrome and how to be supportive

understand.title: Understand
understand.desc: Learn about types, causes, and treatments of Duane Syndrome

research.title: Research
research.desc: Explore the latest scientific studies with AI-powered summaries

connect.title: Connect
connect.desc: Join a global community of patients, parents, and allies

thrive.title: Thrive
thrive.desc: Discover daily tips and life hacks from people who get it

research.title: Research
research.description: Latest research papers about Duane Syndrome from PubMed, Europe PMC, and Semantic Scholar, with AI-generated summaries at different reading levels.
research.emptyState: The research feed will auto-populate once the database is connected. Papers are fetched daily from PubMed.
research.noResults: No papers match your filters. Try adjusting or clearing them.
research.noAiSummary: AI summary not available for this paper.
research.aiNote: AI summary based on abstract + full-text conclusions

common.disclaimer: This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.

footer.tagline: Empowering the Duane Syndrome community worldwide
footer.aboutText: A free, open-source resource built by and for the Duane Syndrome community.
